# Extrapolation Calculator

> Free online extrapolation calculator for predicting future values using linear, exponential, polynomial, and logarithmic methods.

## Calculator
- Linear Extrapolation
- Exponential Growth Calculation
- Polynomial Trend Analysis
- Logarithmic Prediction
- Quadratic Curve Fitting
- R² Score and Confidence Metrics
- Export to CSV and PNG

## Pages
- / - Calculator homepage
- /about-us/ - About the project
- /contact-us/ - Contact form
- /blog/ - Articles about extrapolation methods
- /terms/ - Terms of service
- /privacy/ - Privacy policy

## Languages
Supported in: English, Hindi, Spanish, Russian, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Bengali, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Polish, Indonesian, Arabic, Bulgarian, Turkish, Swedish

## Technical
- Built with Astro, React, Tailwind CSS
- All calculations run client-side
- No data stored on servers
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessible
